complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.针对 PCB **整体表面** 的检测（不依赖具体元件）。常用于检测元件之间、丝: Inspects the **entire PCB surface** without relying on individual components. Useful for surface defects in regions between components or along silkscreen edges — contamination, foreign objects, residue, and so on — as a complement to per-component inspection. The ROI is defined in terms of **Include / Exclude Regions** rather than individual components.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.进入 **产品编程页面**（Teach），点击顶部标签页 **整板检测**。: Open the **Teach** page for a product, then click the **Whole Board Inspection** tab at the top.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.整板检测主界面：左侧检测项列表 + 包含 / 排除区域工具 + 中央 PCB 画: Whole Board Inspection main view: inspection-item list on the left, Include/Exclude region tools, and the PCB canvas in the center.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.页面右侧提供检测项列表。当前支持的检测项：: The right side of the page lists the available inspection items. Currently supported:
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.**表面污染检测（Surface Contamination）**：基于 AI: **Surface Contamination**: an AI-driven check that flags stains, oil, burrs, and foreign objects on the PCB surface. Each inspection item can be enabled or disabled independently.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.需要时勾选对应检测项的开关。: Toggle the switch on each inspection item as needed.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.整板检测使用两类区域定义有效检测范围：: Whole Board Inspection uses two types of regions to define the effective inspection area:
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.**包含区域（Include Regions，绿色）**：明确要检测的区域。若: **Include Regions (green)**: areas explicitly marked for inspection. If **no Include Region is defined**, the entire PCB is inspected by default.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.**排除区域（Exclude Regions，红色）**：在检测范围内主动排除的: **Exclude Regions (red)**: areas to skip within the inspection scope. Commonly used to leave out fixture edges, silkscreen logos, barcode stickers, and other patterns that would otherwise be mistaken for contamination.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.在画布上点击工具栏对应按钮即可开始绘制：: Click the matching toolbar button to start drawing on the canvas:
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.选中绿色 **添加包含区域** 按钮 → 在画布上拖动框选包含区域。: Click the green **Add Include Region** button, then drag on the canvas to draw the region.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.选中红色 **添加排除区域** 按钮 → 在画布上拖动框选排除区域。: Click the red **Add Exclude Region** button, then drag on the canvas to draw the region.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.每个区域绘制完成后会出现在右侧的 **区域列表** 中。点击列表项可：: Each region appears in the **Region List** on the right after drawing. From a list entry you can:
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.**定位（Locate）**：让相机移动到该区域，便于核对位置。: **Locate**: move the camera to the region so you can verify its position.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.所有改动会自动保存到当前产品的整板检测配置中，无需手动点击保存按钮。检测时系统会: Changes are saved to the product's Whole Board Inspection configuration automatically; there is no manual save button. The runtime applies the current configuration on every inspection.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.表面污染检测以 AI 模型为核心。开启该检测项后：: Surface Contamination is driven by an AI model. With the item enabled:
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.系统在每次检测时会对所有 **包含区域 - 排除区域** 内的像素做表面缺陷推理: On every inspection the system runs surface-defect inference over pixels inside the **Include Regions minus the Exclude Regions**.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.AI 给出的污染区域会在复检页面上以高亮显示，便于人工确认；: The AI's flagged areas are highlighted on the review page for operator confirmation.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.模型的可检范围会随产品配置与训练数据迭代而调整。: The detectable defect categories shift over time as the product configuration and training data evolve.
complete_user_guide/features/whole_board.整板检测与单元件检测 **同时启用、各自独立判定**。整板检测发现的污染区域不会: Whole Board Inspection and per-component inspection **both run at once, with independent verdicts**. A contamination flagged by Whole Board Inspection does not change any component's OK/NG status, but it is listed alongside the component NGs on the review page so the operator can address both together.

complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.为产品定义 **mark 点（参考标记点）** 与 **独特标记（unique: Define a product's **Mark Points** (reference marks) and **Unique Markers**, so that the system can locate the actual PCB position reliably before each inspection. Mark Points compensate for incoming-board shift and small misalignment between sub-boards in an array; Unique Markers automatically distinguish two different PCBs in A/B-side mixed-product inspection.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.进入 **产品编程页面**（Teach），点击顶部第一个标签页 **标记 / 对: Open the **Teach** page for a product, then click the first top tab — **Mark / Align PCB**.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.标记 / 对齐 PCB 主界面：左侧标记列表 + 中央 PCB 画布: Mark / Align PCB main view: marker list on the left, PCB canvas in the center.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.点击工具栏的 **+ 标记** 按钮，在拍摄图像上框选 PCB 上固定、易识别的: Click the **+ Mark** button on the toolbar, then drag on the captured image to box a stable, easy-to-recognize reference mark on the PCB (a circular mark, rectangular mark, or a complex silkscreen pattern). The new mark appears in the marker list on the left.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.每个 mark 点都支持以下属性配置：: Each Mark Point exposes the following options:
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**标记形状（Shape Type）**：圆形 / 矩形 / 模板匹配。 - *: **Shape Type**: Circle / Rectangle / Template Match. **Circle / Rectangle** — uses an AI algorithm to locate a mark of that shape. Robust and the preferred choice. **Template Match** — uses the image inside the ROI as a template. Switch to this when the mark surface carries ink, oxidation, or lighting variation that throws the AI algorithm off.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**二值化抽色（Mark Binarization）**：可在 mark 点底色: **Mark Binarization**: enable when the mark's background color is unstable; the mark is first reduced to a binary mask before matching. Enabling it exposes a **Tricolor range** (X / Y / Z / A); click **Show Color Range Mask** to preview the binarization live.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**定位（Locate）**：让相机移动到当前 mark 点的金板位置，便于核对: **Locate**: move the camera to this Mark Point's golden-board position to verify the location.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**预测中心（Predict Center）**：系统重新分析当前框内图像，自动: **Predict Center**: re-analyzes the image inside the ROI and auto-adjusts the Mark Point's center; useful for cleaning up a hand-drawn box that drifted slightly.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**精修（Refine）**：手动微调 mark 点框的位置与大小。: **Refine**: manually fine-tune the Mark Point's position and size.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.需要 **2 个 mark 点**\\ （分别置于 PCB 的对角位置）才能进行: Two Mark Points (one in each opposite corner of the PCB) are needed for 2D alignment. The current release **supports up to 2 Mark Points** — no more can be added.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.标记 / 对齐 PCB 画布上的 mark 点位置示意: Mark Point placement on the Mark / Align PCB canvas
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.仅在 **A/B 面双产品检测** 场景下需要。点击 **+ 独特标记** 按钮: Only needed for **A/B-side mixed-product inspection**. Click **+ Unique Marker**, then box an area on each product that is visibly different from the other side — a notch, a unique silkscreen, a one-of-a-kind component. The selected area becomes the product's identification feature.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.独特标记支持选择 **分类方法**：: Each Unique Marker can pick one of three **classification methods**:
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**GENERIC**：通用 AI 分类器，适合大多数差异明显的场景。: **GENERIC**: general-purpose AI classifier, suitable when the two products differ obviously.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**OCV**：基于字符外观对比，适合两个产品有不同但相近的丝印文字。: **OCV**: compares character appearance; works well when the two products carry different but similar silkscreen text.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**OCR**：基于字符识别，要求字符清晰、可读。: **OCR**: relies on character recognition; the text must be clear and legible.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.请确保所选区域在两个产品上 **差异明显**\\ （例如缺口或独有元件），否则系: Make sure the selected area is **visibly different** between the two products (e.g. a notch or a unique component); otherwise the system may fail to distinguish A/B at runtime.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.每个产品在 A/B 面模式下需要 **正好一个** 独特标记。若该独特标记区域在: In A/B-side mode each product needs **exactly one** Unique Marker. If the chosen region is not distinctive enough between the two sides, starting inspection returns **HTTP 428** and the system prompts you to re-select the area.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**检测时找不到 Mark 点，报错退出**：先尝试切到 **AI 算法**（圆: **Mark Point not found at inspection time, aborts with error**: first try the **AI algorithm** (Circle / Rectangle) — it is more robust. If ink, oxidation, or contamination on the mark surface causes the AI circle finder to fail, switch to **Template Match**.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**Mark 点找到了但定位不准 / 误报多**：检查是否板子放反（对称 mar: **Mark Point found but localization is off / frequent false positives**: check whether the board was loaded reversed (symmetric marks can be found in the wrong place by coincidence). Make sure both Mark Points are on stable, wear-resistant locations, and place them as far apart as possible (close to opposite corners) so the rotation angle can be resolved precisely.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**AB 面切换后 Mark 点找不到**: **Mark Point can't be found after switching A/B side**: first confirm that the board orientation is correct. If side B alone is found but mixed A/B fails, the Unique Marker region is most likely not distinctive enough — return to this page and re-select a more clearly different area.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**AB 面切换后 Mark 点找不到**：先确认板子方向放置正确；单独测 B: **Mark Point can't be found after switching A/B side**: first confirm that the board orientation is correct. If side B alone is found but mixed A/B fails, the Unique Marker region is most likely not distinctive enough — return to this page and re-select a more clearly different area.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**热板与冷板差异导致间歇误报**：在元件配置中适当放大 **允许偏移距离**: **Intermittent false positives between hot and cold boards**: in the component configuration, increase **Allowed Shift Distance** and **Allowed Rotation Angle** so the alignment mechanism can absorb the slight thermal deformation of the board.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.优先选择 PCB 上 **固定、不易磨损、不易被遮挡** 的圆形或矩形丝印参考点: Prefer **stable, wear-resistant, unobstructed** circular or rectangular silkscreen reference marks on the PCB.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.避免选择 **元件本身**（元件可能贴歪或缺料），避免选择 **靠近 PCB 边: Avoid using **components themselves** (a component may be skewed or missing) and avoid **locations close to the PCB edge** (which can be cropped during stitching).
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.避免选择 **对称分布的 mark 点**\\ （板子放反时可能被错误识别）。: Avoid **symmetrically placed marks** — they can be mis-identified when the board is loaded reversed.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.每块 PCB 选择 **2 个** mark 点（当前版本上限），分别置于 PC: Pick **2 Mark Points** per PCB (the current ceiling), one in each opposite corner, so the pair spans the full board.

complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.产品设置区（**设置**，即 Recipe）位于编程页面（Teach）左侧标签栏: The product setup area — **Recipe** — sits at the top of the left-hand tab strip on the Teach page. It contains five sub-tabs for configuring the conveyor, PCB physical parameters, and inspection verdict logic. The sub-tabs are, in order:
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.每个子标签完成后会显示蓝色对勾图标，表示该步骤已配置完成。后四个子标签在完成前置: A blue check icon appears next to a sub-tab once that step is complete. The last four sub-tabs are disabled until their prerequisite step is done — work through them in order.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.设置区五个子标签栏（PCB详情 / 传送带设置 / PCB尺寸 / 全PCB拍摄: The Recipe area's five sub-tabs: PCB Detail / Conveyor Setup / PCB Dimension / Full PCB Capture / Inspection Settings
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.PCB详情标签页包含两个区域：: The PCB Detail tab has two areas:
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**产品名称（产品名称）**：可在此输入或修改产品名称。产品名称须唯一；若与已有: **Product Name**: enter or rename the product here. The name must be unique; saving a duplicate name shows an error. Click **Save** to commit, **Cancel** to discard the edit.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**检测参数（Specs for Inspection）**：以列表形式显示四项: **Specs for Inspection**: lists the current state of four product parameters; each row carries an action button that jumps to the corresponding sub-tab:
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**传送带宽度（Conveyor Width）**：未设置时显示 ``(未定义): **Conveyor Width**: shows ``(undefined)`` when unset, the value in millimeters when set. Click **Set** to jump to **Conveyor Setup**.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**PCB尺寸（PCB Dimension）**：未测量时显示 ``(未定义)`: **PCB Dimension**: shows ``(undefined)`` when unmeasured, width × height (mm) once measured. Click **Measure** to jump to **PCB Dimension**.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**全PCB拍摄（Full PCB Capture）**：未拍摄时显示 ``(未: **Full PCB Capture**: shows ``(undefined)`` when not yet captured, *captured* once acquired. Click **Capture** to jump to **Full PCB Capture**.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**检测设置（Inspection Settings）**：显示当前判废模式摘要: **Inspection Settings**: shows a summary of the current verdict mode (see below). Click **Configure** to jump to **Inspection Settings**.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.PCB详情标签页：产品名称、检测参数四行（传送带宽度 / PCB尺寸 / 全PC: PCB Detail tab: Product Name plus four Specs-for-Inspection rows (Conveyor Width / PCB Dimension / Full PCB Capture / Inspection Settings)
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.传送带设置用于在编程过程中锁定传送带并调整宽度，以便手动放板或使用 PCB 进入: Conveyor Setup locks the conveyor for the programming session and adjusts its width so you can load boards manually or use PCB In.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**选择一个传送带（Select a Conveyor）**：从下拉列表中选择当: **Select a Conveyor**: pick an available conveyor slot from the drop-down.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**锁定传送带（Lock Conveyor for this Task）**：点: **Lock Conveyor for this Task**: click to claim the selected conveyor for this programming session.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**设置传送带宽度（Set Conveyor Width）**：在输入框中输入目: **Set Conveyor Width**: enter the target width (mm), then click **Move to Width** to drive the conveyor to that width. The current width is shown below for reference.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**保存并继续（Save and Continue）**：确认宽度后点击此按钮，: **Save and Continue**: after confirming the width, click to write it into the product and jump to **PCB Dimension**. Enabled only after the conveyor is locked.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**释放传送带（Release Conveyor）**：操作完成后点击此按钮，释: **Release Conveyor**: when you're done, click to release the exclusive lock.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.传送带设置步骤：选择传送带 + 锁定 / 释放传送带按钮、进板 / 出板: Conveyor Setup steps: Select a Conveyor + Lock / Release buttons + PCB In / PCB Out
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.该标签页用于测量或输入 PCB 的物理尺寸（宽度与高度，单位 mm）。操作流程与: This sub-tab measures or accepts the PCB's physical dimensions (width and height, in millimeters). The workflow is the same as the **Enter or Calculate Dimension** step in the Create-Product wizard; see :ref:`创建产品` for details.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.该标签页用于重新执行完整 PCB 拍摄，生成用于检测的黄金图像。操作流程与创建产: This sub-tab re-captures the full PCB to produce the golden image used during inspection. The workflow is the same as the **Full PCB Capture** step in the Create-Product wizard; see :ref:`创建产品` for details. After capture, you can adjust camera parameters here (exposure, gain, white balance, and so on) and re-capture to overwrite the current version.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.检测设置标签页用于配置拼板产品中 **子板（sub-PCB）** 的自动判废逻辑: The Inspection Settings sub-tab configures automatic verdict logic for **sub-boards** in a PCB Array (panel) product — how the system decides each sub-board is good or bad.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.可从 PCB详情 标签页点击 **检测设置** 行右侧的 **配置** 按钮进入: Reach this sub-tab from PCB Detail by clicking **Configure** on the Inspection Settings row.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.Switch 开关，默认 **开启**。启用后，系统根据子板上 NG 元件的比例: Switch; default **on**. When enabled, the system auto-fails a sub-board based on the proportion of NG components on it. Exposes:
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**失败比例阈值（Failure ratio threshold）**：Inpu: **Failure ratio threshold**: numeric input, range ``0.0–1.0``, default ``0.5``. A sub-board is judged bad when its NG-component ratio exceeds this threshold.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.Switch 开关，默认 **关闭**。启用后，系统依据产品中已定义的坏板标记元: Switch; default **off**. When enabled, the system uses the product's defined badmark components to decide each sub-board (see :ref:`检测控制与特殊标记`). Exposes:
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**任一NG**：只要有任意一个坏板标记元件判为 NG，子板即判为坏板。: **Any NG**: the sub-board is bad if any badmark component is NG.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**全部NG**：所有坏板标记元件均判为 NG，子板才判为坏板。: **All NG**: the sub-board is bad only when every badmark component is NG.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**已定义坏板标记元件数（Badmark elements defined）**: **Badmark elements defined**: read-only count of badmark components currently defined in the product.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.若启用了坏板标记模式但尚未定义任何坏板标记元件，页面会显示黄色警告提示，说明该模: When the badmark mode is on but no badmark components are defined, a yellow warning explains that the mode will have no effect.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.若 **使用NG元件比例** 和 **使用坏板标记元件** 均关闭，页面会显示提: If both **Use NG component ratio** and **Use badmark elements** are off, the page shows a notice: sub-boards will not be auto-judged — manual review only.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.编辑完成后点击 **保存** 提交修改；点击 **取消** 恢复为上次已保存的值: Click **Save** to commit; click **Cancel** to revert to the last saved values. Before saving, the system checks that **Failure ratio threshold** is in ``[0, 1]`` and blocks the save with an error if it isn't.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**PCB详情中的检测设置状态摘要**: **Inspection Settings status summary on PCB Detail**
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.PCB详情标签页的 **检测设置** 行会根据当前配置显示以下摘要文字：: The Inspection Settings row on PCB Detail shows one of the following summaries:
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**仅比例**：仅启用了NG元件比例模式。: **Ratio only**: only the NG-component-ratio mode is enabled.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**仅坏板标记**：仅启用了坏板标记模式。: **Badmark only**: only the badmark mode is enabled.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.**仅人工复检**：两种模式均已关闭。: **Manual review only**: both modes are disabled.
complete_user_guide/features/recipe.po.检测设置标签页：使用NG元件比例开关、失败比例阈值、使用坏板标记元件开关: Inspection Settings sub-tab: Use NG component ratio switch, Failure ratio threshold, Use badmark elements switch

complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.共线性检测用于验证一组贴装元件在 PCB 板上是否保持共线排列。将元件按网格分组: Collinearity Inspection verifies that a set of mounted components is laid out on a straight line on the PCB. Components are grouped on a grid; the system fits a lattice model and checks whether each component's measured position is aligned to its theoretical position within tolerance. Useful for connector pin rows, LED arrays, and any layout where collinearity matters.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.在示教页面选择产品，切换至 **元件** 标签页，在左侧标签栏点击 **共线性检: On the Teach page, select a product and switch to the **Component** tab, then click **Collinearity Inspection** on the left tab strip.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.左侧面板顶部显示 **共线性组** 列表，每行呈现组名、网格规格（列数 × 行数: The top of the left panel shows the **Collinearity Groups** list. Each row carries the group name, grid spec (columns × rows), and member count. Click a row to highlight that group's members in the right-hand viewer; click again to clear the highlight. The actions on each row:
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**定位** — 图标为瞄准器，工具提示\"定位\"。将右侧视图自动缩放并居中至: **Locate** — crosshair icon, tooltip *Locate*. Pans and zooms the right viewer to fit all members of the group.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**运行共线性拟合** — 图标为节点连线，工具提示\"运行共线性拟合\"。对该: **Run Collinearity Fit** — connected-nodes icon, tooltip *Run Collinearity Fit*. Runs the collinearity fit for the group and overlays the fitted lattice, expected centers, and residual markers on the viewer. The fit result is persisted on the backend and used as the reference for runtime decisions.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**编辑共线性组** — 图标为铅笔，工具提示\"编辑共线性组\"。打开编辑对话: **Edit Collinearity Group** — pencil icon, tooltip *Edit Collinearity Group*. Opens an edit dialog where the name and the inspection parameters can be changed.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**移除** — 图标为垃圾桶（红色），工具提示\"移除\"。弹出确认对话框，确: **Remove** — red trash-can icon, tooltip *Remove*. Opens a confirmation dialog; on confirm, the group and its fit data are permanently deleted.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**新建组** 区域位于左侧面板中部。新建操作分为以下步骤：: The **New Group** area sits in the middle of the left panel. Creation runs through these steps:
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**选择绘制工具** — 在 **矩形** 和 **多边形** 两个按钮中选择一: **Pick a drawing tool** — choose between **Rectangle** and **Polygon**:
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**矩形**：在板图上拖动鼠标绘制矩形选框。: **Rectangle**: drag on the board image to draw a rectangular selection.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**多边形**：逐点单击定义多边形顶点；右键撤销上一个顶点；按 Enter 键完: **Polygon**: click to add vertices; right-click to undo the last vertex; press Enter to finish.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**绘制选择区域** — 单击 **绘制选择区域** 按钮，在右侧视图上按所选工: **Draw the selection area** — click **Draw Selection Area** and box the target components in the right viewer with the chosen tool. Once drawn, the captured mounting components enter a refinement state; everything else is hidden.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.仅拥有至少一个贴装特征（``_mount`` 类型）的元件才会被纳入候选范围；无: Only components that own at least one mounting feature (``_mount`` type) qualify; components without a mounting feature are excluded.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**精调选区** — 进入精调模式后，左侧面板提示\"左键点击任意矩形可将其从选: **Refine the selection** — once in refinement mode the left panel reads *Left-click any rectangle to remove it from the selection. Click Confirm when done.* Click a component rectangle in the viewer to remove it; the **Selected Components** list on the left updates live. With fewer than 3 components selected, a red message says *A Collinearity Group needs at least 3 components.*
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**确认选区** — 选区包含至少 3 个元件后，单击 **确认** 按钮，弹出: **Confirm the selection** — once at least 3 components are selected, click **Confirm** to open the **Create Collinearity Group** dialog.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**第三步：填写组信息（创建或编辑）**: **Step 3: Fill in the group info (create or edit)**
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.对话框顶部显示当前已选元件数量（只读）。需填写以下字段：: The dialog header shows the current selected-component count (read-only). Fill in:
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**组名称** — 必填，最多 64 个字符，用于在列表中标识该组。: **Group name** — required, up to 64 characters; identifies the group in the list.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**网格宽度（列数）** — 整数，范围 1–1024，表示元件网格的列数。: **Grid width (columns)** — integer, 1–1024; number of columns in the component grid.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**网格长度（行数）** — 整数，范围 1–1024，表示元件网格的行数。网格: **Grid length (rows)** — integer, 1–1024; number of rows in the component grid. Grid width × grid length must equal the total selected-component count, otherwise the save is rejected.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**最大列偏差（毫米）** — 浮点数，步长 0.1，默认值 0.5 mm，表示: **Max column deviation (mm)** — float, step 0.1, default 0.5 mm; maximum allowed deviation along the column direction at inspection time.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**最大行偏差（毫米）** — 浮点数，步长 0.1，默认值 0.5 mm，表示: **Max row deviation (mm)** — float, step 0.1, default 0.5 mm; maximum allowed deviation along the row direction at inspection time.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**最大角度偏差（度）** — 浮点数，步长 0.1，范围 0–360，默认值: **Max angular deviation (°)** — float, step 0.1, range 0–360, default 5°; maximum allowed rotational deviation at inspection time.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**拟合所需最小成员数** — 整数，范围 2–1024，默认值 3，表示执行拟: **Minimum members for fit** — integer, range 2–1024, default 3; the minimum number of alignable members needed to run the fit. When fewer alignable members are present at inspection time, the result is reported as *Cannot judge*.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.填写完成后单击 **保存** 创建或更新该组；单击 **取消** 放弃操作。: Click **Save** to create or update the group; **Cancel** discards the edit.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.组创建完成后，在列表行上单击 **运行共线性拟合** 按钮，系统将向后端提交拟合: Once the group is created, click **Run Collinearity Fit** on its row to submit the fit request. After a successful fit, the viewer overlays (see the legend):
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**拟合点阵网格** — 蓝色虚线，根据网格宽度 × 行数计算出的理论排列。: **Fitted lattice grid** — blue dashed lines, derived from the configured grid width × rows.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**预期中心** — 绿色圆点，拟合模型对每个元件的预期位置。: **Expected centers** — green dots, the fit's predicted position for each component.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**残差** — 红色线段，实测中心与预期中心之间的偏差向量。: **Residuals** — red segments, the deviation vector between the measured center and the expected center.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**残差大小** — 黄色数字标注，以毫米为单位显示的残差大小。: **Residual magnitude** — yellow numeric labels in millimeters.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.左侧面板底部的 **图例** 区域始终可见，说明右侧视图中各颜色与形状的含义：: The **Legend** area at the bottom of the left panel is always visible and explains the colors and shapes in the viewer:
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.蓝色实线矩形 — **可选元件**\\ （未加入任何组的候选元件）。: Solid blue rectangle — **Available component** (a candidate not yet in any group).
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.黄色虚线矩形 — **贴装特征**\\ （元件的 ``_mount`` ROI）: Dashed yellow rectangle — **Mounting feature** (the component's ``_mount`` ROI).
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.绿色粗线矩形（半透明绿色填充）— **当前组成员**\\ （当前选中组的元件）。: Thick green rectangle with semi-transparent green fill — **Current group member** (a component in the currently-selected group).
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.组创建后必须单独执行 **运行共线性拟合** 操作，拟合结果才会写入后端。未完成: After a group is created, you must run **Run Collinearity Fit** explicitly for the fit result to be persisted. Groups that have not been fit show *Cannot judge: group not yet fit — run the fit on the Teach page* at inspection time.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**网格宽度（列数）× 网格长度（行数）** 必须精确等于所选元件数，否则保存时: **Grid width × grid length** must exactly equal the selected-component count; otherwise the save shows *Grid width × height must equal the selected component count.*
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.**拟合所需最小成员数** 默认为 3。若运行拟合时可对齐的成员数不足，则检测结: **Minimum members for fit** defaults to 3. If fewer alignable members are present when the fit runs, the result reads *Cannot judge: not enough alignable members*.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.修改现有组的网格参数或偏差阈值后，需重新运行 **运行共线性拟合** 才能使更新: After changing an existing group's grid parameters or deviation thresholds, re-run **Run Collinearity Fit** so the new thresholds take effect.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.共线性检测仅适用于 2D 贴装检测场景，不涉及 3D 或在线多传送带模式。: Collinearity Inspection is for 2D mounting inspection only — it doesn't cover 3D or online multi-conveyor modes.
complete_user_guide/features/collinearit.正在查看某个分组（已高亮）时，**绘制选择区域** 按钮不可用；需先在列表中点击: While a group is highlighted, **Draw Selection Area** is disabled; click the highlighted group in the list to clear the highlight before starting a new group.
